# Hey extraction ledger

- Deterministic package ZIPs, release metadata, integrity, install, and lockfiles remain Hey package plumbing.
- Project scaffolding is Hey CLI porcelain.
- Documentation policy, source handoffs, registry layout, and website publication remain in `hey_packager`.
- The default `jayteesf.github.io` checkout must never become language-core or stdlib policy.
- Promote a packager operation into Hey only when multiple unrelated registries need the same application-neutral primitive.
